discordlinkedroles-not-configured: The Discord Linked Roles extension is not configured. Please contact the wiki administrator.
discordlinkedroles-status-connected: Your wiki account is connected to Discord as '''$1'''.
discordlinkedroles-status-disconnected: Your wiki account is not connected to Discord.
discordlinkedroles-error-generic: An error occurred communicating with Discord. Please try again later.
discordlinkedroles-error-state-mismatch: The authorization request could not be verified. Please try connecting again.
discordlinkedroles-error-discord-already: This Discord account is already linked to another wiki account.
discordlinkedroles-error-wiki-already-li: Your wiki account is already linked to a Discord account. Please disconnect first.
discordlinkedroles-connect-success: Your wiki account has been connected to Discord as '''$1'''.
discordlinkedroles-disconnect-success: Your wiki account has been disconnected from Discord.
